title: 4-Bit Binary Adder-Subtractor Logic Diagram
description: A visual representation of a 4-bit parallel adder-subtractor circuit using XOR gates as controlled inverters and a 4-bit ripple carry adder to perform both addition and subtraction operations.
relationships: Mode control (M) connects to all XOR gates to control inversion
Each B input bit connects to one XOR gate
XOR outputs and A inputs connect to full adder inputs
Carry propagates from C0 through each full adder to C4
Subtraction is performed by inverting B (using M=1) and setting C0=1
Addition is performed with M=0 and C0=0
